<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houthond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sáe̤k]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[hak:Kap-sut]][[ja:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[nds:Holt-Hund]][[vi:Giáp Tuất]][[za:Gyapswt]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sut]][[zh-yue:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houthond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sáe̤k]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[hak:Kap-sut]][[ja:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[nds:Holt-Hund]][[vi:Giáp Tuất]][[za:Gyapswt]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sut]][[zh-yue:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houthond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sáe̤k]][[de:Holz-Hund]][[fr:Chien de bois]][[hak:Kap-sut]][[ja:甲戌]][[ko:갑술]][[nds:Holt-Hund]][[vi:Giáp Tuất]][[za:Gyapswt]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sut]][[zh-yue:甲戌]][[zh:甲戌]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Dog|kanji=甲戌|romaji=kinoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=jiǎxū|w=chia-hsü|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ɕy⁵³|y=gaap6 seot1|j=gaap6 seot1|ci=kaːp̚ sœt̚|mc=kæp syt|oc-bs=kaːp ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Wood Dog also known as 甲戌''' (kinoe inu, kouboku no inu, koujutsu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 11th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Dog (zodiac)|en|Dog (zodiac)|WD=Q755126|lt=Dog (戌)|1=Dog (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Wood overcomes Earth).  
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Dog (甲戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-inu
***Onyomi 1: kokuju
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sul (갑술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Tuất

<!--
==
* Yang Wood Dog (甲戌) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 zeoi3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: きのえいぬ (kinoe-inu)
***Onyomi: こうぼくのいぬ (kōboku-no-inu)
***Onyomi: こうじゅつ (kōjutsu)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapsul
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Tuất

-->
==Years of Yang Wood Dog==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 14 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of 甲戌.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Wood Dog (甲戌)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 14|en|AD 14|WD=Q23596|lt=14 AD|1=AD 14}}
* {{ill|AD 74|en|AD 74|WD=Q30412|lt=74 AD|1=AD 74}}
* {{ill|AD 134|en|AD 134|WD=Q31338|lt=134 AD|1=AD 134}}
* {{ill|194|en|194|WD=Q30837|lt=194 AD|1=194}}
* {{ill|254|en|254|WD=Q31257|lt=254 AD|1=254}}
* {{ill|314|en|314|WD=Q32828|lt=314 AD|1=314}}
* {{ill|374|en|374|WD=Q34141|lt=374 AD|1=374}}
* {{ill|434|en|434|WD=Q33308|lt=434 AD|1=434}}
* {{ill|494|en|494|WD=Q30945|lt=494 AD|1=494}}
* {{ill|554|en|554|WD=Q32167|lt=554 AD|1=554}}
* {{ill|614|en|614|WD=Q31064|lt=614 AD|1=614}}
* {{ill|674|en|674|WD=Q30302|lt=674 AD|1=674}}
* {{ill|734|en|734|WD=Q23573|lt=734 AD|1=734}}
* {{ill|794|en|794|WD=Q30887|lt=794 AD|1=794}}
* {{ill|854|en|854|WD=Q24981|lt=854 AD|1=854}}
* {{ill|914|en|914|WD=Q24855|lt=914 AD|1=914}}
* {{ill|974|en|974|WD=Q23781|lt=974 AD|1=974}}
|
* {{ill|1034|en|1034|WD=Q19324|lt=1034 AD|1=1034}}
* {{ill|1094|en|1094|WD=Q19478|lt=1094 AD|1=1094}}
* {{ill|1154|en|1154|WD=Q19649|lt=1154 AD|1=1154}}
* {{ill|1214|en|1214|WD=Q5358|lt=1214 AD|1=1214}}
* {{ill|1274|en|1274|WD=Q5527|lt=1274 AD|1=1274}}
* {{ill|1334|en|1334|WD=Q6007|lt=1334 AD|1=1334}}
* {{ill|1394|en|1394|WD=Q6398|lt=1394 AD|1=1394}}
* {{ill|1454|en|1454|WD=Q6476|lt=1454 AD|1=1454}}
* {{ill|1514|en|1514|WD=Q6204|lt=1514 AD|1=1514}}
* {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574 AD|1=1574}}
* {{ill|1634|en|1634|WD=Q6872|lt=1634 AD|1=1634}}
* {{ill|1694|en|1694|WD=Q7694|lt=1694 AD|1=1694}}
* {{ill|1754|en|1754|WD=Q7623|lt=1754 AD|1=1754}}
* {{ill|1814|en|1814|WD=Q6943|lt=1814 AD|1=1814}}
* {{ill|1874|en|1874|WD=Q7761|lt=1874 AD|1=1874}}
* {{ill|1934|en|1934|WD=Q18714|lt=1934 AD|1=1934}}
* {{ill|1994|en|1994|WD=Q2067|lt=1994 AD|1=1994}}
|
* {{ill|2054 AD|ja|2054年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2054|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2054 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2114 AD|ja|2114年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2114|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2114 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2174 AD|ja|2174年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2174|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2174 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2234 AD|ja|2234年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2234|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2234 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2294 AD|ja|2294年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2294|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2294 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2354 AD|ja|2354年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2354|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2354 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2414 AD|ja|2414年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2414|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2414 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2474 AD|ja|2474年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2474|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2474 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=25世紀|1=25th century|WD=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2534 AD|ja|2534年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2534|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2534 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2594 AD|ja|2594年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2594|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2594 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2654 AD|ja|2654年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2654|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2654 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2714 AD|ja|2714年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2714|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2714 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2774 AD|ja|2774年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2774|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2774 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2834 AD|ja|2834年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2834|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2834 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2894 AD|ja|2894年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2894|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2894 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2954 AD|ja|2954年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2954|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2954 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}
==Months of Yang Wood Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of 甲戌. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Dog==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for 甲戌 is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of 甲戌 is the 5th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Kap-chik]]
[[zh-yue:甲戌]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Wood Dog|qq=ja|甲戌|version=84123751|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Gák-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Hundvi]]
[[de:Yang Wood Dog]]

[[ja:甲戌]]
[[zh:甲戌]]
[[ko:갑술]]
[[fr:Chien de bois]]
[[de:Holz-Hund]]

[[af:Houthond (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Hundeen]]
[[en:Wood Dog]]
[[fr:Chien de boisboishak]]
[[it:Kap-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Giáp Tuất]]
[[za:Kanceij]]
[[ar:Yang Wood Dog]]

<!--Yang Wood Dog--><!--Yang Wood Dog-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gák-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Kap-sut]]
[[nds:Holt-Hund]]
[[za:Gyapswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-sut]]
[[zh-yue:甲戌]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Gák-sáe̤k]]
[[hak:Kap-sut]]
[[nds:Holt-Hund]]
[[za:Gyapswt]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kap-sut]]
[[zh-yue:甲戌]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062917}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
